summary: Completed e2e testing of Measurement module with updated flow. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (MeasurementPhotosPage, MeasurementDetailsPage, ProductConfigurePage, MeasurementConfigPage) working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - APIs auto-create default measurement config when accessed
context_for_next_testing_agent: All measurement features tested and working: 1) Measurement is now a PARALLEL process - accessible from dashboard via 'Measurement' button, separate from Customize flow. 2) Configuration flow now goes to Styling (not Measurement) - verified 'Next: Styling' button on ProductConfigurePage. 3) Measurement has 2 steps: Step 1 (Photos - Side/Back/Front upload) → Step 2 (Details - Height/Weight with unit toggles, Product checkboxes, 9 Measurement field buttons with defaults, Preference). 4) GET /api/measurements/config returns 9 fields and 11 product_types by default. 5) POST /api/measurements saves customer measurement data. 6) Admin /admin/measurements page shows measurement configuration with editable fields and product types.

step2_height_weight_toggles.details: Height with cms/feet toggle, Weight with kgs/lbs toggle - both working

step2_product_checkboxes.details: 11 product type checkboxes (Jacket, 2pc Suit, 3pc Suit, Vest, Pant, Shirt, Legal Gown, T Shirt, Jeans, Legal Jacket, Shoe) - Jacket checked by default

step2_measurement_buttons.details: 9 measurement buttons with default values (BICEPS-15, CHEST-41, HIPS-42, JACKET LENGTH-31, SHOULDERS-18, SLEEVE LENGTH-26, STOMACH-40, WAIST-37, WRIST-10) + PREFERENCE button

configuration_to_styling_flow.details: Dashboard → Customize → Category → Product → Configuration → 'Next: Styling' button (NOT Measurement)

api_post_measurements.details: POST /api/measurements saves customer measurement data with height, weight, selected_products, measurements, preference

admin_measurement_config_page.details: /admin/measurements shows Measurement Configuration with editable fields (name, default value, unit, required toggle, text input toggle) and product types

measurement_photos_page_guard.details: MeasurementPhotosPage shows 'No customer selected' when accessed without customer state

measurement_details_page_guard.details: MeasurementDetailsPage shows 'No customer selected' when accessed without customer state

step1_photo_upload_boxes.details: Step 1 shows 3 photo upload boxes (Side, Back, Front) with + icons and 'Share Tomorrow' option
